LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER, FOR WHICH NO OPPOSITION WAS RECEIVED, IS GRANTED. JUDGE: JOSEPH QUINN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Oct-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc.'s motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order, for which no opposition was received, is GRANTED.

Judge: Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
